name: Frost Touch
mechanics: Melee spell attack. 1d6 cold and the target's speed drops 10 ft until the end of its next turn. Scales with level.
narration_cue: Your hand closes and the cold bites deep — frost crackles across skin.

name: Magic Missile
mechanics: Three darts auto-hit for 1d4+1 force each, split between targets as you choose. More darts at higher levels.
narration_cue: Darts of light streak out, each finding its mark with perfect inevitability.

name: Mage Hand
mechanics: A spectral hand manipulates objects up to 10 lbs at range. It cannot attack.
narration_cue: A translucent hand materializes, fingers flexing with your intent.

name: Hold Person
mechanics: One humanoid makes a WIS save or is paralyzed; it re-saves each turn. Attacks against it have advantage.
narration_cue: They freeze mid-motion, eyes still moving, mouth struggling.

name: Invisibility
mechanics: The target becomes invisible until it attacks or casts an offensive spell. Attacks against it have disadvantage.
narration_cue: Light bends around you — first translucent, then gone.

name: Fireball
mechanics: A bead of flame detonates in a 20 ft sphere. DEX save, 3d6 fire on a fail, half on a success. Scales with level.
narration_cue: A bead of light detonates — heat, light, the roar of air consumed.

name: Chain Lightning
mechanics: Primary target takes 4d6 lightning, then it arcs to three others within 30 ft for 2d6 each. DEX save halves.
narration_cue: Lightning strikes the first and leaps — finding the next body and the next.

name: Guiding Light
mechanics: The next attack roll against the marked target has advantage. No damage.
narration_cue: A faint halo settles over your ally's target — subtle, warm, marking them.

name: Bless
mechanics: Up to three allies gain +1d4 on attack rolls and saving throws. Concentration.
narration_cue: You speak their names and your patron hears — warmth settling into bones.

name: Spiritual Weapon
mechanics: A spectral weapon themed to your patron attacks independently each round for 1d8 + WIS. No concentration.
narration_cue: A weapon forms from light and will — not yours, but your god's.

name: Mass Heal
mechanics: Restore 2d8 + WIS HP to every ally within earshot. The benchmark group heal.
narration_cue: The light finds every wound, every bruise, every ache. Everyone feels it at once.

name: Greater Restoration
mechanics: Remove one curse, disease, ability drain, the Hollowed condition, or another lasting affliction. The reliable Hollowed cure.
narration_cue: Light that goes deeper than flesh — reaching into the pattern and straightening what was bent.

name: Produce Flame
mechanics: Conjure flame in your hand for light, or hurl it as a ranged spell attack for 1d6 fire. Scales with level.
narration_cue: Fire blooms in your palm — drawn from the heat of the earth. It knows you.

name: Faerie Fire
mechanics: Creatures in a 20 ft cube make a DEX save or are outlined in light; they cannot be invisible and attacks against them have advantage. Concentration.
narration_cue: Drifting motes of cold light cling to everything, outlining bodies in eerie luminescence.

name: Call Lightning
mechanics: Outdoors, call a bolt for 2d8 lightning (DEX half); later rounds strike again for 2 Focus. Concentration.
narration_cue: The sky answers. A pause, then a focused lance of light finds exactly what you pointed at.

name: Ice Storm
mechanics: A 20 ft radius is hammered by hail. DEX save, 2d8 bludgeoning + 2d6 cold on a fail, half on a success. The area becomes difficult terrain for a round.
narration_cue: The temperature drops. Fist-sized hail hammers everything below.

name: Regenerate
mechanics: Restore 4d8+15 HP at once, then 1 HP per round for an hour, regrowing severed limbs over the full duration.
narration_cue: Life flows in and doesn't stop — the body repairs with the patience of a forest regrowing after fire.
